Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Galileo's handwritten notes found in ancient astronomy text 22 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Analytic Fog Rendering with Volumetric Primitives (2025) 78 upvotes, 7 comments
  3. Entomologists use a particle accelerator to image ants at scale 100 upvotes, 17 comments
  4. Ada 2022 107 upvotes, 19 comments
  5. CT Scans of Health Wearables 183 upvotes, 39 comments
  6. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 471 upvotes, 136 comments
  7. Astra: An open-source observatory control software 79 upvotes, 20 comments
  8. LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor 255 upvotes, 84 comments
  9. Plasma Bigscreen – 10-foot interface for KDE plasma 107 upvotes, 33 comments
  10. Art Bits from HyperCard 52 upvotes, 13 comments
  11. Good Bad ISPs 94 upvotes, 29 comments
  12. this css proves me human 145 upvotes, 53 comments
  13. A tool that removes censorship from open-weight LLMs 113 upvotes, 49 comments
  14. I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has ignited a passion again 64 upvotes, 25 comments
  15. Show HN: Claude-replay – A video-like player for Claude Code sessions 60 upvotes, 25 comments
  16. Workers who love ‘synergizing paradigms’ might be bad at their jobs 502 upvotes, 288 comments
  17. The disappearing Form D (2018) 9 upvotes, 1 comments
  18. Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting 223 upvotes, 130 comments
  19. Tech employment now significantly worse than the 2008 or 2020 recessions 710 upvotes, 481 comments
  20. The Shady World of IP Leasing 53 upvotes, 26 comments
  21. Polar Factor Beyond Newton-Schulz – Fast Matrix Inverse Square Root 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  22. What canceled my Go context? 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. Show HN: The Roman Industrial Revolution that could have been (Vol 2) 27 upvotes, 15 comments
  24. C# strings silently kill your SQL Server indexes in Dapper 44 upvotes, 30 comments
  25. Global warming has accelerated significantly 955 upvotes, 946 comments
  26. Anthropic, please make a new Slack 184 upvotes, 163 comments
  27. Show HN: Kula – Lightweight, self-contained Linux server monitoring tool 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  28. We might all be AI engineers now 162 upvotes, 270 comments
  29. Launch HN: Palus Finance (YC W26): Better yields on idle cash for startups, SMBs 36 upvotes, 59 comments
